g.title: ebike_abs
g.text: Cargo e-bike panic-stop — Simulink-style signal map (human / cadence / ABS scenarios)
every arrow labelled: symbol python_name [units] (sampling) · scenario-select diamond: one modulator path active per run

g.title: scenario_select
g.text: {human | cadence | abs} · one path active per run

g.title: actuator
g.text: L di/dt = V_pwm − R i − K_e ω_m
J dω_m/dt = K_t i − b_m ω_m

g.title: normal_load
g.text: N_f = (m g a − m a_x h) / L

g.title: tire
g.text: σ = μ_peak N_f (1 − λ) / (2 C_x λ)

g.title: legend
g.text: scenario select — exactly one upstream V_pwm forwarded per run
(dashed-red lag-1 feedback lands only on the ABS branch,
